title: rubus × subrotundiformis
intro: Rubus × subrotundiformis, a hybrid species of the raspberry genus, is a type of flowering plant known for its edible fruits and medicinal properties. The plant's leaves and roots have been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation, fever, and digestive problems, due to its rich content of antioxidants and flavonoids. The health benefits of Rubus × subrotundiformis include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Rubus × subrotundiformis is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
